title: Missile-Toad hit sends Limited Summons to original owner cemetery

card.rawText: If this creature hits, send all Limited Summons on the field to their original owner's cemetery.

effect.value: If this creature hits, send all Limited Summons on the field to their original owner's cemetery.

plan.title: Missile-Toad hit sends Limited Summons to original owner cemetery

notes: Read text first: If this creature hits, send all Limited Summons on the field to their original owner's cemetery.
